description: Simran introduces the session on security in DeFi, highlighting the rise of scams and hacks targeting new users in the crypto space. Raghav and Gabby from Merkle Science discuss incident response strategies, emphasizing the importance of monitoring and tracking fund movements during security incidents.
topic_summary: The session covers the evolving security landscape in DeFi, the risks faced by new users, and the incident response framework developed by Merkle Science, including monitoring incidents and tracking affected addresses [t=345.99].
